overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark rural village at night, holding a torch to illuminate the dirt path and traditional wooden buildings. The video progresses from open countryside into a village center with stone walls and thatched-roof cottages.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark country path surrounded by trees

dark silhouettes of leafy trees lining the left side of the path
dark silhouettes of leafy trees lining the right side of the path
dark starry night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a dark dirt path at night. The surroundings are barely visible except for the silhouettes of trees lining both sides of the trail against a starry sky.

events.description: character raises a burning torch into the frame, casting warm orange light on the path and revealing surrounding vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking while holding a lit torch in the left hand, illuminating wildflowers and grass along the path edges

entered.detail: burning wooden torch held in left hand with flickering flames casting dynamic shadows
red flowers in the grass illuminated by the torchlight
raised wooden platform or shelter visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: The torch becomes visible in the left hand, dramatically improving visibility and revealing red wildflowers along the path. The character continues walking toward a wooden structure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden fencing and traditional cottages

traditional wooden house with steep thatched roof and dark timber framing
dark wooden structure visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The path leads past a wooden fence on the right toward traditional village buildings. The torch illuminates a thatched-roof cottage ahead as the character approaches the village outskirts.

entered.detail: low stone wall with rough texture running alongside the path
wooden gate structure between stone walls leading into a courtyard
white plastered building with dark wooden roof and small window

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village center, walking between stone walls and traditional buildings. The torch illuminates a wooden gate ahead which the character approaches and passes through, revealing more of the village interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate, dark countryside into the heart of a traditional rural village. It begins with a walk along a dark dirt path where only the silhouettes of trees are visible against a starry sky. As a torch is raised in the left hand, the surrounding darkness recedes to reveal red wildflowers lining the trail and a distant wooden structure. The camera then moves past a wooden fence toward the village outskirts, where the torchlight catches the texture of a thatched-roof cottage. Finally, the scene shifts into the village center, gliding between stone walls and traditional buildings before passing through a wooden gate into the interior of the settlement.
